title: Chapter 9
content:
Chapter 9: That Was Nice.

Liam and Rachel ended up on the bed, he made sure to empty his balls because he wasn’t sure when the next opportunity would present itself.

Liam knew he had to be careful regarding all of this, the system had given him over $50,000 in a single day and the alert on his phone was a reminder that this wasn’t some hallucination.

It was real, Rachel rested her hands on his chest as aftercare was something Liam did without question.

He allowed her to spend the night because she wasn’t just a woman he buried his cock into, she was a woman who had given him over $50,000.

This was a blessing and if treating her right was the only thing he had to do, it was the easiest thing in the world to do.

He wondered what else he could do because if he managed to find a woman of high tier, it would be easy to earn at least a million dollars in a freaking day.

This would be the best thing possible and Liam chuckled, he had lived a modest life and he wasn’t rewarded.

But now, the universe was encouraging him to live a more depraved life, something in which he had avoided because reputation was everything.

However, he had lost that reputation so nothing was off limits anymore, Liam planned to enjoy every last bit of it.

Rachel’s hand left his chest and this allowed him to leave the bed to get a glass of water.

Liam felt refreshed, he had no idea she would feel that good but either way, it wasn’t something that he would say was the best of his life.

He checked his phone and there were messages from Darren asking how it went.

Liam smiled, Darren was like a man who liked gossip but would never admit he liked it.

He wasn’t going to answer or give him details, they weren’t in high school anymore.

-

Morning crept up on them, Liam had returned to bed that night but woke up with Rachel nowhere to be seen.

She had returned home and he knew this because of her text, she sent him an attachment of a video of him snoring with the caption: Sleep tight, I didn’t want to wake up the sleeping beauty! Thank you for a wonderful night🤭

Liam smiled to himself, he looked like a mess but that was the side effect of good coochie.

He didn’t respond right away, Liam knew he had to start looking for a place to relocate to, a cheaper place in town.

However, there should be a way for him to acquire this house on a more permanent basis if he had the money.

He didn’t want to undergo the stress of moving and starting over from a new neighborhood but maybe that would also be good for him.

Liam had a haircut but already decided he was going to enroll in a gym, he freshened up and had a big meal as this could very well be the last time he was allowed to eat like a pig.

Liam hopped into his car and went to find a gym that Darren had recommended.

He had seen all of those videos of gym bros secretly showing their cuck fetish as they use cheating as a fantasy to get in shape.

Truth be told, it wasn’t because of Sara he was doing this, it was because he had the time to do so now. He didn’t feel any hatred for her because the signs were there if everyone but him saw it.

At the end of the day, he was to blame for all of this and Liam took accountability for that.

-

Liam found himself standing in front of a gym, the parking lot was small but it was big enough to contain multiple cars.

Pike Peak Fitness, this was the name of the gym and it was on the smaller size, he didn’t want to go to a gym that was overly crowded.

Liam walked in and already regretted it, the stench hit him like a hurricane, and before he knew it, three bulky people surrounded.

"Hey! Welcome newbie! Would you like to register?"

They were way too eager and this put him on guard, Liam instantly took a step back.

"Oh, my bad! Wrong place, I thought this was an eating spot..." Liam said the first thing that came to his mind.

"Of course you did with your fat ass!" A voice said and this hit Liam like a freight train.

"Hey! Who the fuck said that!?" Liam barked and the biggest dude he had ever seen walked in.

This man must have been in his mid forties, the shining bald head and white beard made it easy for Liam to narrow down his age range.

"I did, and what you gonna do about it, sissy boy!?" The dark-skinned man questioned, the testosterone could be felt with the bass his voice carried.

This man was easily 6" 6 and built like the Hulk, the only difference was their skin color.

"Yeah, I will take one form," Liam conceded and this was how he enrolled into Pike Peak Fitness.

-

Rachel returned home and all she could think about was what Liam had done to her, the words that escaped her mouth and how lustful she sounded.

She hoped Liam didn’t think less of her because she put out the first day but the way he made her feel, scream, and orgasm replayed in her head.

It made her heart pound, and who could blame her? She had little to no play despite being built like a sex doll but this was partly because the men who approached her were vulgar.

Or rather, predictable and exhibited similar traits as her ex-husband.

But Liam was a breath of fresh air, he was direct and told her exactly what he wanted.

And his looks definitely helped his case.

Rachel searched for him on socials, she smiled to herself because he only had one picture on his profile, it was a selfie taken a year back. It was subtle but this picture had old money feel to it.

"He is so cute," Rachel muttered under her breath, but she was more surprised by the amount of likes it had, it greatly surpassed his followers.

The first few comments were of women complimenting his looks, but the further down she went, she saw that Liam hadn’t responded to anyone. He didn’t even like a single one

"Mister hard to get," Rachel said with a grin but noticed there was one woman he did like and respond to.

"Hm..." Rachel knew this was her queue to get off but curiosity made her dive deeper.

"Sara..." Rachel mumbled under her breath.
